jobs.title: Switzerland - Voyage Program September 2026 - Food & Beverage

titleByLocale.en: Switzerland - Voyage Program September 2026 - Food & Beverage

jobs.description:
JOB SUMMARY 
 
 The Voyage Global Leadership Development Program 

 Voyage: Training tomorrow’s leaders today 
 Marriott International welcomes recent university graduates to experience the career development adventure of a lifetime and a world of leadership opportunities. Our global leadership development program, Voyage, propels participants on a mentored, learning-inspired journey to prepare you for a successful career. Voyage is a full-time, paid development program. As an associate and trainee, you’ll build upon the skills you developed in school by participating in real world assignments.

 About the journey 
 Voyage is an elite, award-winning program that provides a combination of hands-on, discipline-specific training and a leadership-focused curriculum. The program takes place at a Marriott International managed hotel, not a classroom, and is offered in 50+ countries. Voyage is available in the following disciplines:
 • Food & Beverage Operations
 Work Authorization (EU/Switzerland), Local Language Fluency
 When you join Voyage, you gain access to Marriott’s senior leaders and coaches and have many opportunities to stand out. You’ll participate in mini-rotations across the disciplines to learn firsthand how to manage various hotel functions and to connect with current and former Voyage participants through our social collaboration tools. Each individual’s Voyage journey is unique, spanning 12-18 months dependent upon your career interests, passions, goals, and location. You’ll immediately be immersed in our rich culture and portfolio of global brands to learn how Marriott sets the standard of industry excellence.

 The experience you’ll gain 
 Voyage participants learn by doing! You’ll be fully immersed in the day-to-day operations of a hotel. If accepted into this elite program, you will:
 • Cultivate customer relationships
 • Be a champion for innovation within the organization
 • Get exposure to managing projects & people
 • Improve processes & pitch new initiatives through your Voyage project
 • Take on special projects that will draw upon all your training
 Destination: Marriott leadership 
 You’ll participate in management meetings and collaborate with Voyage participants worldwide. You’ll be expected to solve challenges, as well as offer ideas and innovative solutions. You will also have an opportunity to provide feedback on your curriculum and have an impact on future Voyage hires’ experiences. After graduation, you’ll be well-prepared to pursue your passion and take on new challenges. Many program graduates are ready to step into a Marriott supervisory or entry-level management role right away, because the program has provided a foundation for future leadership.
 
 Ready to embark? 
 To become a Voyage participant, you must have graduated from a university or hotel school within the past year. Other qualifications include:
 • Bachelors degree or equivalent higher level education required (Associates degree acceptable for Culinary)
 (Degree should have been received within 24 months prior to the start of the program)
 • Superior critical-thinking & interpersonal communication skills
 • The ability to foster relationships & work collaboratively
 • The ability to self-manage & be a self-starter
 • A real desire for personal & professional growth
 • Work authorization (EU/Switzerland, Local Language Fluency) 
 Application Process 
 • Online Application
 • Video Interview
 • Management Assessment
 • Live Screening Call
 • Final Interview
 Marriott Associates 
 Previous Interns at Marriott, Current Interns, Part Time Associates, Dual students are encouraged to apply provided they meet the above-mentioned criteria. If you are currently a full-time associate at Marriott International, please speak to your HR Team or email voyageemea@marriott.com
 Want to learn more? 
 Visit MarriottU.com 
 
 - voyager
 

 
 At Marriott International, we are dedicated to being an equal opportunity employer, welcoming all and providing access to opportunity. We actively foster an environment where the unique backgrounds of our associates are valued and celebrated. Our greatest strength lies in the rich blend of culture, talent, and experiences of our associates. We are committed to non-discrimination on any protected basis, including disability, veteran status, or other basis protected by applicable law. 
 #LI-Onsite 

 
 Marriott International is the world’s largest hotel company, with more brands, more hotels and more opportunities for associates to grow and succeed. Be where you can do your best work,​ begin your purpose, belong to an amazing global​ team, and become the best version of you.

descriptionByLocale.it: RIASSUNTO DELLA POSIZIONE ## Il Programma Globale di Sviluppo della Leadership Voyage Voyage: formiamo i leader di domani oggi Marriott International dà il benvenuto a recenti laureati universitari per vivere l'avventura di sviluppo professionale della vita e scoprire un mondo di opportunità di leadership. Il nostro programma globale di sviluppo della leadership, Voyage, accompagna i partecipanti in un percorso guidato e incentrato sull'apprendimento per prepararli a una carriera di successo. Voyage è un programma di sviluppo a tempo pieno e retribuito. In qualità di dipendente e tirocinante, svilupperai le competenze acquisite durante gli studi partecipando ad assegnazioni pratiche. ## Informazioni sul percorso Voyage è un programma d'eccellenza, pluripremiato, che combina una formazione pratica specifica per disciplina e un programma didattico incentrato sulla leadership. Il programma si svolge presso un hotel gestito da Marriott International, non in un'aula, ed è disponibile in oltre 50 paesi. Voyage è disponibile nelle seguenti discipline: - Operazioni Ristorazione Autorizzazione al lavoro (UE/Svizzera), padronanza della lingua locale Quando ti unisci a Voyage, hai accesso ai dirigenti e ai coach senior di Marriott e molte opportunità per distinguerti. Parteciperai a mini-rotazioni tra le diverse discipline per imparare in prima persona come gestire le varie funzioni di un hotel e per entrare in contatto con attuali e precedenti partecipanti a Voyage attraverso i nostri strumenti di collaborazione sociale. Il percorso Voyage di ogni individuo è unico e dura da 12 a 18 mesi, a seconda dei tuoi interessi professionali, passioni, obiettivi e posizione geografica. Sarai immediatamente immerso nella nostra ricca cultura e nel portafoglio di marchi globali per imparare come Marriott stabilisce lo standard di eccellenza del settore. ## L'esperienza che acquisirai I partecipanti a Voyage imparano facendo! Sarai completamente immerso nelle operazioni quotidiane di un hotel. Se accettato in questo programma d'élite, potrai: - Coltivare relazioni con i clienti - Essere un promotore dell'innovazione all'interno dell'organizzazione - Avere esperienza nella gestione di progetti e persone - Migliorare i processi e presentare nuove iniziative attraverso il tuo progetto Voyage - Affrontare progetti speciali che metteranno alla prova tutte le tue competenze ## Destinazione: leadership Marriott Parteciperai a riunioni direttive e collaborerai con altri partecipanti a Voyage in tutto il mondo. Ti si chiederà di risolvere problemi e di proporre idee e soluzioni innovative. Avrai anche l'opportunità di fornire feedback sul programma e di influenzare l'esperienza dei futuri partecipanti a Voyage. Dopo il completamento del programma, sarai ben preparato per perseguire le tue passioni e affrontare nuove sfide. Molti ex partecipanti sono pronti a ricoprire ruoli di supervisione o di management entry-level in Marriott immediatamente, poiché il programma ha fornito una solida base per futuri ruoli di leadership. ## Pronto a partire? Per diventare partecipante a Voyage, devi esserti laureato presso un'università o una scuola alberghiera nell'ultimo anno. Altri requisiti includono: - Laurea triennale o quadriennale o titolo equivalente di livello superiore richiesto (laurea biennale accettabile per l'indirizzo culinario) (Il titolo deve essere stato conseguito entro i 24 mesi precedenti l'inizio del programma) - Eccellenti capacità di pensiero critico e comunicazione interpersonale - Capacità di costruire relazioni e lavorare in modo collaborativo - Capacità di autogestirsi e di essere autonomotivato - Reale desiderio di crescita personale e professionale - Autorizzazione al lavoro (UE/Svizzera), padronanza della lingua locale ## Processo di candidatura - Candidatura online - Colloquio video - Valutazione direzionale - Colloquio telefonico di selezione - Colloquio finale ## Dipendenti Marriott Ex stagisti Marriott, attuali stagisti, dipendenti part-time e studenti dual sono invitati a candidarsi, a condizione che soddisfino i criteri sopra indicati. Se sei attualmente un dipendente a tempo pieno di Marriott International, parla con il tuo team HR o invia un'email a voyageemea@marriott.com ## Vuoi saperne di più? Visita MarriottU.com - voyager Presso Marriott International, ci impegniamo ad essere un datore di lavoro che offre pari opportunità, benvenendo a tutti e garantendo accesso alle opportunità. Favoriamo attivamente un ambiente in cui i background unici dei nostri dipendenti sono valorizzati e celebrati. La nostra più grande forza risiede nella ricca combinazione di culture, talenti ed esperienze dei nostri collaboratori. Siamo impegnati a non discriminare su alcuna base protetta, inclusi disabilità, status di veterano o altre basi protette dalla legge applicabile. #LI-Onsite Marriott International è la più grande azienda alberghiera al mondo, con più marchi, più hotel e più opportunità per i dipendenti di crescere e avere successo. Sii dove puoi dare il meglio di te, iniziare il tuo percorso, far parte di un team globale straordinario e diventare la migliore versione di te stesso.
descriptionByLocale.en:
JOB SUMMARY The Voyage Global Leadership Development Program Voyage: Training tomorrow’s leaders today Marriott International welcomes recent university graduates to experience the career development adventure of a lifetime and a world of leadership opportunities. Our global leadership development program, Voyage, propels participants on a mentored, learning-inspired journey to prepare you for a successful career. Voyage is a full-time, paid development program. As an associate and trainee, you’ll build upon the skills you developed in school by participating in real world assignments. About the journey Voyage is an elite, award-winning program that provides a combination of hands-on, discipline-specific training and a leadership-focused curriculum. The program takes place at a Marriott International managed hotel, not a classroom, and is offered in 50+ countries. Voyage is available in the following disciplines:
• Food & Beverage Operations Work Authorization (EU/Switzerland), Local Language Fluency When you join Voyage, you gain access to Marriott’s senior leaders and coaches and have many opportunities to stand out. You’ll participate in mini-rotations across the disciplines to learn firsthand how to manage various hotel functions and to connect with current and former Voyage participants through our social collaboration tools. Each individual’s Voyage journey is unique, spanning 12-18 months dependent upon your career interests, passions, goals, and location. You’ll immediately be immersed in our rich culture and portfolio of global brands to learn how Marriott sets the standard of industry excellence. The experience you’ll gain Voyage participants learn by doing! You’ll be fully immersed in the day-to-day operations of a hotel. If accepted into this elite program, you will:
• Cultivate customer relationships
• Be a champion for innovation within the organization
• Get exposure to managing projects & people
• Improve processes & pitch new initiatives through your Voyage project
• Take on special projects that will draw upon all your training Destination: Marriott leadership You’ll participate in management meetings and collaborate with Voyage participants worldwide. You’ll be expected to solve challenges, as well as offer ideas and innovative solutions. You will also have an opportunity to provide feedback on your curriculum and have an impact on future Voyage hires’ experiences. After graduation, you’ll be well-prepared to pursue your passion and take on new challenges. Many program graduates are ready to step into a Marriott supervisory or entry-level management role right away, because the program has provided a foundation for future leadership. Ready to embark? To become a Voyage participant, you must have graduated from a university or hotel school within the past year. Other qualifications include:
• Bachelors degree or equivalent higher level education required (Associates degree acceptable for Culinary) (Degree should have been received within 24 months prior to the start of the program)
• Superior critical-thinking & interpersonal communication skills
• The ability to foster relationships & work collaboratively

descriptionByLocale.de:
STELLENBESCHREIBUNG ## Das globale Leadership-Entwicklungsprogramm Voyage Voyage: Wir bilden heute die Führungskräfte von morgen aus Marriott International begrüßt frischgebackene Hochschulabsolventen, die das Karriereentwicklungsabenteuer ihres Lebens erleben und eine Welt voller Führungspositionen entdecken möchten. Unser globales Leadership-Entwicklungsprogramm Voyage begleitet Teilnehmer auf einer betreuten, lernorientierten Reise, um sie auf eine erfolgreiche Karriere vorzubereiten. Voyage ist ein Vollzeit-Entwicklungsprogramm mit Gehalt. Als Mitarbeiter und Trainee bauen Sie auf den in der Ausbildung erworbenen Fähigkeiten auf, indem Sie an praktischen
• Aufgaben teilnehmen. ## Über die Reise Voyage ist ein exklusives, preisgekröntes Programm, das praxisnahe, fachspezifische Schulungen mit einem führungsorientierten Lehrplan kombiniert. Das Programm findet in einem von Marriott International geführten Hotel statt – nicht im Klassenzimmer – und ist in über 50 Ländern verfügbar. Voyage ist in folgenden Fachbereichen verfügbar: - Food & Beverage Operations Arbeitserlaubnis (EU/Schweiz), fließende Sprachkenntnisse in der Landessprache Als Teilnehmer von Voyage erhalten Sie Zugang zu den leitenden Mitarbeitern und Coaches von Marriott und haben zahlreiche Möglichkeiten, sich hervorzutun. Sie absolvieren Mini-Rotationen in verschiedenen Fachbereichen, um praktische Erfahrungen im Management verschiedener Hotelabläufe zu sammeln, und vernetzen sich mit aktuellen und ehemaligen Voyage-Teilnehmern über unsere sozialen Kollaborationstools. Die individuelle Voyage-Reise ist einzigartig und dauert 12 bis 18 Monate, je nach Ihren beruflichen Interessen, Leidenschaften, Zielen und dem Standort. Sie werden unmittelbar in unsere vielfältige Unternehmenskultur und unser globales Markenportfolio eingebunden und lernen, wie Marriott den Standard für Branchenexzellenz setzt. ## Die Erfahrungen, die Sie sammeln werden Teilnehmer bei Voyage lernen durch Handeln! Sie sind vollständig in den täglichen Hotelbetrieb integriert. Wenn Sie in dieses exklusive Programm aufgenommen werden, können Sie: - Kundenbeziehungen aufbauen - Innovationen im Unternehmen vorantreiben - Erfahrungen in der Leitung von Projekten und Mitarbeitern sammeln - Prozesse verbessern und neue Initiativen über Ihr Voyage-Projekt vorschlagen - Spezielle Projekte übernehmen, die Ihr gesamtes Trainingswissen erfordern ## Ziel: Marriott-Führungskraft Sie nehmen an Management-Meetings teil und arbeiten weltweit mit anderen Voyage-Teilnehmern zusammen. Sie werden erwartungsgemäß Herausforderungen lösen sowie Ideen und innovative Lösungen einbringen. Außerdem haben Sie die Möglichkeit, Feedback zum Lehrplan zu geben und die Erfahrungen künftiger Voyage-Teilnehmer mitzugestalten. Nach Abschluss des Programms sind Sie bestens vorbereitet, Ihre Leidenschaft zu verfolgen und neue Herausforderungen anzunehmen. Viele Absolventen sind nach Abschluss des Programms sofort bereit, eine leitende oder einsteigende Managementposition bei Marriott zu übernehmen, da das Programm eine solide Grundlage für zukünftige Führungsrollen bietet. ## Bereit für die Reise? Um am Voyage-Programm teilzunehmen, müssen Sie innerhalb des letzten Jahres an einer Hochschule oder Hotelfachschule abgeschlossen haben. Weitere Qualifikationen umfassen: - Abgeschlossenes Bachelorstudium oder gleichwertiger Hochschulabschluss erforderlich (Associate Degree akzeptabel für den Bereich Küche) (Der Abschluss sollte innerhalb der letzten 24 Monate vor Programmstart erworben worden sein) - Ausgeprägte analytische und zwischenmenschliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, Beziehungen aufzubauen und kollaborativ zu arbeiten - Fähigkeit zur Selbstorganisation und Eigeninitiative - Echtes Interesse an persönlichem und beruflichem Wachstum - Arbeitserlaubnis (EU/Schweiz), fließende Sprachkenntnisse in der Landessprache ## Bewerbungsprozess - Online-Bewerbung - Videointerview - Management-Assessment - Telefonischer Screening-Call - Abschlussinterview ## Marriott-Mitarbeiter Ehemalige Praktikanten bei Marriott, derzeitige Praktikanten, Teilzeit-Mitarbeiter und Duale Studenten sind herzlich eingeladen, sich zu bewerben, sofern sie die oben genannten Kriterien erfüllen. Wenn Sie derzeit Vollzeit-Mitarbeiter bei Marriott International sind, wenden Sie sich bitte an Ihr HR-Team oder senden Sie eine E-Mail an voyageemea@marriott.com ## Möchten Sie mehr erfahren? Besuchen Sie MarriottU.com - voyager Bei Marriott International setzen wir uns dafür ein, ein Arbeitgeber mit Chancengleichheit zu sein und alle willkommen zu heißen sowie Zugang zu Möglichkeiten zu bieten. Wir fördern aktiv eine Umgebung, in der die individuellen Hintergründe unserer Mitarbeiter geschätzt und gefeiert werden. Unsere größte Stärke liegt in der vielfältigen Kombination aus Kultur, Talent und Erfahrung unserer Mitarbeiter. Wir verpflichten uns zur Nichtdiskriminierung auf allen geschützten Grundlagen, einschließlich Behinderung, Veteranenstatus oder anderen durch geltendes Recht geschützten Kriterien. #LI-Onsite Marriott International ist das weltweit größte Hotelunternehmen mit mehr Marken, mehr Hotels und mehr Möglichkeiten für Mitarbeiter, sich weiterzuentwickeln und erfolgreich zu sein. Arbeiten Sie dort, wo Sie Ihre besten Leistungen erbringen, Ihren Lebenszweck finden, zu einem außergewöhnlichen globalen Team gehören und die beste Version Ihrer selbst werden können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: RÉSUMÉ DU POSTE ## Le programme mondial de développement du leadership Voyage Voyage : former aujourd'hui les leaders de demain Marriott International accueille les jeunes diplômés universitaires désireux de vivre l'aventure professionnelle de leur vie et de découvrir un monde d'opportunités en matière de leadership. Notre programme mondial de développement du leadership, Voyage, accompagne les participants dans un parcours encadré et axé sur l'apprentissage pour les préparer à une carrière réussie. Voyage est un programme de développement à temps plein et rémunéré. En tant qu'employé et stagiaire, vous renforcerez les compétences acquises à l'université en participant à des missions concrètes. ## À propos du parcours Voyage est un programme d'élite, récompensé à plusieurs reprises, qui allie une formation pratique spécifique à chaque discipline et un programme de formation centré sur le leadership. Le programme se déroule dans un hôtel géré par Marriott International, et non en salle de classe, et est disponible dans plus de 50 pays. Voyage est proposé dans les disciplines suivantes : - Opérations Restauration Autorisation de travail (UE/Suisse), maîtrise de la langue locale En rejoignant Voyage, vous aurez accès aux cadres supérieurs et coachs de Marriott et de nombreuses opportunités de vous démarquer. Vous effectuerez des mini-rotations entre les différentes disciplines afin d'apprendre concrètement à gérer les diverses fonctions hôtelières et de vous connecter avec les participants actuels et anciens de Voyage grâce à nos outils de collaboration sociale. Le parcours Voyage de chaque individu est unique et dure de 12 à 18 mois, selon vos intérêts professionnels, vos passions, vos objectifs et votre localisation. Vous serez immédiatement plongé dans notre riche culture d'entreprise et notre portefeuille de marques mondiales pour découvrir comment Marriott fixe la norme d'excellence du secteur. ## L'expérience que vous allez acquérir Les participants à Voyage apprennent en faisant ! Vous serez pleinement immergé dans les opérations quotidiennes d'un hôtel. Si vous êtes sélectionné pour ce programme d'élite, vous pourrez : - Développer des relations avec les clients - Être un acteur de l'innovation au sein de l'organisation - Acquérir une expérience dans la gestion de projets et de personnes - Améliorer les processus et proposer de nouvelles initiatives via votre projet Voyage - Mener des projets spéciaux qui mettront à profit l'ensemble de votre formation ## Destination : leadership Marriott Vous participerez à des réunions de direction et collaborerez avec d'autres participants Voyage à travers le monde. On attend de vous que vous résolviez des problèmes, proposiez des idées et des solutions innovantes. Vous aurez également l'opportunité de donner votre avis sur le programme et d'influencer l'expérience des futurs recrutés Voyage. À l'issue du programme, vous serez parfaitement préparé à poursuivre votre passion et relever de nouveaux défis. De nombreux diplômés sont prêts à occuper immédiatement un poste de superviseur ou de management junior chez Marriott, car le programme leur a fourni une base solide pour des fonctions de leadership futures. ## Prêt à embarquer ? Pour devenir participant au programme Voyage, vous devez être diplômé d'une université ou d'une école hôtelière au cours de l'année écoulée. D'autres qualifications sont requises : - Diplôme de bachelor ou équivalent de niveau supérieur requis (diplôme d'associate accepté pour la cuisine) (Le diplôme doit avoir été obtenu dans les 24 mois précédant le début du programme) - Excellentes compétences en pensée critique et communication interpersonnelle - Capacité à établir des relations et à travailler en collaboration - Capacité à s'auto-gérer et à être autonome - Réelle envie de croissance personnelle et professionnelle - Autorisation de travail (UE/Suisse), maîtrise de la langue locale ## Processus de candidature - Candidature en ligne - Entretien vidéo - Évaluation managériale - Appel de présélection - Entretien final ## Employés Marriott Les anciens stagiaires de Marriott, les stagiaires en cours, les employés à temps partiel et les étudiants en alternance sont encouragés à postuler s'ils remplissent les critères mentionnés ci-dessus. Si vous êtes actuellement employé à temps plein chez Marriott International, veuillez contacter votre équipe RH ou envoyer un e-mail à voyageemea@marriott.com ## Vous souhaitez en savoir plus ? Visitez MarriottU.com - voyager Chez Marriott International, nous nous engageons à être un employeur offrant l'égalité des chances, en accueillant tout le monde et en offrant un accès aux opportunités. Nous favorisons activement un environnement où les profils uniques de nos employés sont valorisés et célébrés. Notre plus grande force réside dans la richesse de la diversité culturelle, des talents et des expériences de nos collaborateurs. Nous nous engageons à ne pas discriminer sur quelque base protégée que ce soit, y compris le handicap, le statut de vétéran ou toute autre base protégée par la loi applicable. #LI-Onsite Marriott International est la plus grande entreprise hôtelière au monde, avec plus de marques, plus d'hôtels et plus d'opportunités pour les employés de progresser et de réussir. Rejoignez-nous là où vous pouvez donner le meilleur de vous-même, commencer votre parcours, faire partie d'une équipe mondiale exceptionnelle et devenir la meilleure version de vous-même.

jobs.title: Style Agent (housekeeper) (summer + winter) - W VERBIER

titleByLocale.fr: Agent de style (ménageur) (été + hiver) - W VERBIER

jobs.description:
W VERBIER 
 Perched at 1,531 meters and located just steps away from Verbier’s main ski lifts, W Verbier offers immediate access to more than 400 kilometers of skiing, biking and hiking terrain. The iconic lifestyle W Escape has been voted Switzerland’s and World’s Best Ski Hotel at the prestigious World Ski Awards, eight years in a row. 

 Perched in the Swiss Alps at 1,531 meters with direct access to over 400 km of skiing and hiking terrain, W Verbier Retreat mixes urban design with an alpine touch. Our 5 star hotels 123 rooms and suites, each with fireplace, Signature W bed and private balcony are perfect for an intimate escape after a full day of exploring. Our luxury spa hotel offers a wide range of culinary options, including the Brasserie 1519, and the best mixology at W Living Room. Guests unwind in 1,300 sqm. of Alpine oasis at Le Spa featuring two pools, 9 treatment rooms, 24 hour FIT gym and facilities. 
• We offer 245 square meters of flexible event space. Looking for more exclusivity, find our luxury residences, featuring 2 to 3 bedrooms, private kitchen, balconies and lounge spaces. The highlight is the easy access to all privileges and facilities of the Hotel right next door. From the W Mountain Concierge to the renowned and exclusive Whatever Whenever service, W Verbier team is there to make it happen 

 

 Visit in live here : W VERBIER Home 
 

 JOB DESCRIPTION 

 As "Talent", you represent W lifestyle to our guests. You are the soul behind the brand and you bring it to life. W Talents are as unique as the brand itself and are personally engaged from a lifestyle standpoint to the warm, witty, welcoming environment of the brand. 

 AN EXCITING CHANCE TO JOIN THE W VERBIER TEAM 

 Style our Guests' W Experience. 
 Clean guest rooms in accordance with established quality and performance standards to allow a sufficient quantity of vacant and clean guest rooms for sale. 
 Clean occupied guest rooms. 
 Clean and reset guest bedroom and bathroom areas according to established standards. 
 Organize and stock cleaning cart and organize linen closets on floors assigned. 

 PROFILE 

 You have a prior experience in a 5* hotel in housekeeping. 
 You are highly motivated 
 Fluent in French and English 
 Be detail oriented and have a passion for giving guests an exceptional experience. 
 Real interest in the worlds of taste, sound, body, scene and stance 
 Due to visa restrictions, only applications from Switzerland and the European Union will be considered 

 
 W Hotels’ mission is to Ignite Curiosity, Expand Worlds. We are a place to experience life. We’re here to open doors and open minds. We are constantly inspired by new faces and new experiences. A tuned-in, up-for-anything spirit is at our core and has made us renowned for reinventing the norms of luxury around the globe. Whatever/Whenever is our culture and service philosophy that brings our guests’ passions to life. If you are original, innovative, and always looking towards the future of what’s possible, welcome to W Hotels. In joining W Hotels, you join a portfolio of brands with Marriott International. Be where you can do your best work,​ begin your purpose, belong to an amazing global​ team, and become the best version of you.

descriptionByLocale.it:
W VERBIER W VERBIER Arroccato a 1,531 metri e situato a pochi passi dai principali impianti di risalita di Verbier, W Verbier offre un accesso immediato a oltre 400 chilometri di piste da sci, mountain bike e trekking. L’iconico stile di vita W Escape è stato votato miglior sci Hotel della Svizzera e del Mondo ai prestigiosi World Ski Awards, otto anni di fila. Arroccato nelle Alpi svizzere a 1,531 metri con accesso diretto a oltre 400 km di piste da sci e da trekking, W Verbier Retreat mescola il design urbano con un tocco alpino. I nostri hotel 5 stelle 123 camere e suite, ognuna con camino, letto Signature W e balcone privato sono perfetti per una fuga intima dopo una giornata intera di esplorare. Il nostro hotel benessere di lusso offre una vasta gamma di opzioni culinarie, tra cui la Brasserie 1519, e la migliore mixologia al W Living Room. Gli ospiti si rilassano in 1.300 mq. di oasi alpina presso Le Spa con due piscine, 9 sale di trattamento, palestra FIT 24 ore e servizi.
• Offriamo 245 mq di spazio flessibile per eventi. Alla ricerca di una maggiore esclusività, trovate le nostre residenze di lusso, con 2 o 3 camere da letto, cucina privata, balconi e spazi lounge. Il punto culminante è il facile accesso a tutti i privilegi e le strutture dell'Hotel proprio accanto. Dal W Mountain Concierge al rinomato ed esclusivo servizio Qualunque sia, il team W Verbier è lì per farlo accadere. Visita in diretta qui: W VERBIER Home ## Descrizione - Come "Talent", rappresenti lo stile di vita W ai nostri ospiti. Sei l'anima dietro il marchio e lo porti alla vita. W Talents sono unici come il marchio stesso e sono personalmente impegnati da un punto di vista lifestyle al caldo, spiritoso, accogliente ambiente del marchio. - UN'ESCITAZIONE A JOIN THE W VERBIER TEAM - Style our Guest' W Experience. - Camere pulite in conformità con standard di qualità e prestazioni stabiliti per consentire una quantità sufficiente di camere per gli ospiti vacanti e pulite in vendita. - Camere pulite occupate. - Pulire e reimpostare camere e bagni secondo gli standard stabiliti. - Organizzare e stock pulizia carrello e organizzare armadi di biancheria su pavimenti assegnati. ## Profilo - Hai un'esperienza precedente in un hotel 5* nella pulizia. - No. Sei altamente motivato - Fluente in francese e inglese - Essere orientato al dettaglio e avere una passione per dare agli ospiti un'esperienza eccezionale. - Interessi reali nei mondi del gusto, del suono, del corpo, della scena e della posizione - A causa delle restrizioni del visto, solo le domande della Svizzera e dell’Unione Europea saranno considerate ##
• Cosa offriamo W Hotels’ mission is to Ignite Curiosity, Expand Worlds. Siamo un posto dove vivere la vita. Siamo qui per aprire porte e menti aperte. Siamo costantemente ispirati a nuovi volti e nuove esperienze. Uno spirito sintonizzato, up-for-anything è al nostro centro e ci ha resi noti per reinventare le norme del lusso in tutto il mondo. Qualunque sia la nostra cultura e la nostra filosofia di servizio che anima le passioni dei nostri ospiti. Se siete originali, innovativi e sempre alla ricerca del futuro di ciò che è possibile, benvenuti a W Hotels. Nell'unione di W Hotels, unisciti a un portafoglio di marchi con Marriott International. Essere dove si può fare il vostro lavoro migliore, iniziare il vostro scopo, appartengono a un team globale incredibile, e diventare la migliore versione di voi. ## Contatto (Nessuna informazione di contatto fornito)
descriptionByLocale.en:
W VERBIER Perched at 1,531 meters and located just steps away from Verbier’s main ski lifts, W Verbier offers immediate access to more than 400 kilometers of skiing, biking and hiking terrain. The iconic lifestyle W Escape has been voted Switzerland’s and World’s Best Ski Hotel at the prestigious World Ski Awards, eight years in a row. Perched in the Swiss Alps at 1,531 meters with direct access to over 400 km of skiing and hiking terrain, W Verbier Retreat mixes urban design with an alpine touch. Our 5 star hotels 123 rooms and suites, each with fireplace, Signature W bed and private balcony are perfect for an intimate escape after a full day of exploring. Our luxury spa hotel offers a wide range of culinary options, including the Brasserie 1519, and the best mixology at W Living Room. Guests unwind in 1,300 sqm. of Alpine oasis at Le Spa featuring two pools, 9 treatment rooms, 24 hour FIT gym and facilities.
• We offer 245 square meters of flexible event space. Looking for more exclusivity, find our luxury residences, featuring 2 to 3 bedrooms, private kitchen, balconies and lounge spaces. The highlight is the easy access to all privileges and facilities of the Hotel right next door. From the W Mountain Concierge to the renowned and exclusive Whatever Whenever service, W Verbier team is there to make it happen Visit in live here : W VERBIER Home JOB DESCRIPTION As "Talent", you represent W lifestyle to our guests. You are the soul behind the brand and you bring it to life. W Talents are as unique as the brand itself and are personally engaged from a lifestyle standpoint to the warm, witty, welcoming environment of the brand. AN EXCITING CHANCE TO JOIN THE W VERBIER TEAM Style our Guests' W Experience. Clean guest rooms in accordance with established quality and performance standards to allow a sufficient quantity of vacant and clean guest rooms for sale. Clean occupied guest rooms. Clean and reset guest bedroom and bathroom areas according to established standards. Organize and stock cleaning cart and organize linen closets on floors assigned. PROFILE You have a prior experience in a 5* hotel in housekeeping. You are highly motivated Fluent in French and English Be detail oriented and have a passion for giving guests an exceptional experience. Real interest in the worlds of taste, sound, body, scene and stance Due to visa restrictions, only applications from Switzerland and the European Union will be considered W Hotels’ mission is to Ignite Curiosity, Expand Worlds. We are a place to experience life. We’re here to open doors and open minds. We are constantly inspired by new faces and new experiences. A tuned-in, up-for-anything spirit is at our core and has made us renowned for reinventing the norms of luxury around the globe. Whatever/Whenever is our culture and service philosophy that brings our guests’ passions to life. If you are original, innovative, and always looking towards the future of what’s possible, welcome to W Hotels. In joining W Hotels, you join a portfolio of brands with Marriott International. Be where you can do your best work,​ begin your purpose, belong to an amazing global​ team, and become the best version of you.

Nos hôtels 5 étoiles 123 chambres et suites, chacune avec cheminée, lit Signature W et balcon privé sont parfaits pour une évasion intime après une journée complète d'exploration. jobs.title: Sushiman (Winter 26/27) - W VERBIER
jobs.description:
JOB DESCRIPTION 
 
 Become a W Talent and Embody the W Art of Living! 
 
 As a ‘Talent’, you are the essence of W for our guests. You bring a playful, warm and welcoming touch that makes all the difference in our W hotels. You are unique, passionate, and your personality shines through in every interaction. 
 
 
 
 AN EXCEPTIONAL OPPORTUNITY TO JOIN THE W VERBIER TEAM ! 
 
 
 
 Are you passionate about Japanese cuisine and love creating dishes that tickle the taste buds? At W Verbier, we're looking for our future sushi rockstar to join our dynamic team. If you have a flair for detail and are ready to take on a challenge while igniting the curiosity of our customers, we want to meet you! 
 
 
 
 As a Sushiman, you'll be helping the Sushi Chef make delicious Japanese dishes. This includes cleaning and cutting meat and fish, preparing seafood, as well as cooking, frying, assembling and seasoning dishes. You will warmly welcome our customers and present your culinary creations in an elegant and appetising manner. 
 
 
 
 PROFILE 
 
 Previous experience in a similar position or in Japanese cuisine 
 
 A genuine interest in the Japanese / sushi world 
 
 Previous experience in the kitchen of a 5* hotel 
 
 Knowledge of hygiene and cleanliness standards 
 
 Fluent French and English/Spanish 
 
 You should be highly motivated. 
 
 Real interest in the worlds of taste, sound, body, scene and stance 
 
 Be detail oriented and have a passion for giving guests an exceptional experience. 
 
 
 
 Position to be filled for the Winter season : December 2026 to March 2027 
 
 
 
 Due to visa restrictions only applicants from Switzerland and European Union can be considered. 
 
 

 
 At Marriott International, we are dedicated to being an equal opportunity employer, welcoming all and providing access to opportunity. We actively foster an environment where the unique backgrounds of our associates are valued and celebrated. Our greatest strength lies in the rich blend of culture, talent, and experiences of our associates. We are committed to non-discrimination on any protected basis, including disability, veteran status, or other basis protected by applicable law. 

 
 W Hotels’ mission is to Ignite Curiosity, Expand Worlds. We are a place to experience life. We’re here to open doors and open minds. We are constantly inspired by new faces and new experiences. A tuned-in, up-for-anything spirit is at our core and has made us renowned for reinventing the norms of luxury around the globe. Whatever/Whenever is our culture and service philosophy that brings our guests’ passions to life. If you are original, innovative, and always looking towards the future of what’s possible, welcome to W Hotels. In joining W Hotels, you join a portfolio of brands with Marriott International. Be where you can do your best work,​ begin your purpose, belong to an amazing global​ team, and become the best version of you.

Siete unici, appassionati e la vostra personalità brilla in ogni interazione. ## Opportunità di lavoro UNA OPPORTUNITÀ ESTRATZIONALE PER IL TEAM VERBIER W! Sei appassionato di cucina giapponese e amore creare piatti che solleticano le papille gustative? A W Verbier, stiamo cercando il nostro futuro sushi rockstar per unirsi al nostro team dinamico. Se avete un tocco per i dettagli e siete pronti ad affrontare una sfida mentre accendono la curiosità dei nostri clienti, vogliamo incontrarvi! ## Mansioni Come Sushiman, aiuterai il Sushi Chef a preparare deliziosi piatti giapponesi. Si tratta di: - pulire e tagliare la carne e il pesce - preparare i frutti di mare - cucinare, friggere, assemblare e condire i piatti - caldamente accogliere i nostri clienti e presentare le vostre creazioni culinarie in modo elegante e appetibile ##

Promuoviamo attivamente un ambiente in cui gli sfondi unici dei nostri associati sono apprezzati e celebrati. La nostra più grande forza risiede nella ricca miscela di cultura, talento ed esperienze dei nostri associati. Ci impegniamo a non discriminazione su base protetta, tra cui disabilità, status di veterano, o altre basi protette dalla legge applicabile. La missione degli hotel è quella di accendere la curiosità, i mondi esplosi. Siamo un posto dove vivere la vita. Siamo qui per aprire porte e menti aperte. jobs.title: Stagiaire Superviseur Housekeeping
jobs.description:
Build upon your classroom studies through our Hotel Internship Program opportunities. You will learn first-hand about a hotel's operations. Our Hotel Internship Program allows you to truly experience the industry from the ground up, where our founders and many of our leaders began. You will get immersed in Marriott's culture and business and find your true calling in the travel industry. Our internships are typically available in many different areas of the hotel. By gaining hands-on experience in the exciting world of hotel management, you�ll be better prepared to pursue opportunities post graduation. Here�s to exploring, kickstarting your dream career, and joining us on your journey!
 
 To be considered for an internship, you must be a current college or university student. Want to join us? Apply now!
 
 Marriott International is the world�s largest hotel company, with more brands, more hotels and more opportunities for associates to grow and succeed. We believe a great career is a journey of discovery and exploration. So, we ask, where will your journey take you?
 
 marriotthotelinternship

 
 At Marriott International, we are dedicated to being an equal opportunity employer, welcoming all and providing access to opportunity. We actively foster an environment where the unique backgrounds of our associates are valued and celebrated. Our greatest strength lies in the rich blend of culture, talent, and experiences of our associates. We are committed to non-discrimination on any protected basis, including disability, veteran status, or other basis protected by applicable law. 
 Run sold room reports, verify room status, determine discrepant rooms, prioritize room cleaning, and update status of departing guest rooms. Assist Housekeeping management in managing daily activities. Act as a liaison to coordinate the efforts of Housekeeping, Engineering, Front Office, and Laundry. Document and resolve issues with discrepant rooms with the Front Desk. Prepare and distribute room assignments to Housekeeping staff. Record, monitor, and update list of ‘Do Not Disturb' rooms. Ensure that vacant dirty rooms are cleaned by the necessary time and assign rush rooms and rooms previously on the ‘Do Not Disturb' list. Complete required Housekeeping paperwork. 
 Follow all company and safety and security policies and procedures; report any maintenance problems, safety hazards, accidents, or injuries; complete safety training and certifications. Ensure uniform and personal appearance are clean and professional; maintain confidentiality of proprietary information; protect company assets. Welcome and acknowledge all guests according to company standards; anticipate and address guests’ service needs; thank guests with genuine appreciation. Ensure adherence to quality expectations and standards. Develop and maintain positive working relationships with others; support team to reach common goals; listen and respond appropriately to the concerns of other employees. Speak with others using clear and professional language; prepare and review written documents accurately and completely. Enter and locate work-related information using computers. Stand, sit, or walk for an extended period of time. Move, lift, carry, push, pull, and place objects weighing less than or equal to 10 pounds without assistance. Perform other reasonable job duties as requested by Supervisors. 

 
 Marriott Hotels strive to elevate the art of hospitality, innovating at every opportunity while keeping the comfort of the oh-so-familiar all around the globe. As a host with Marriott Hotels, you will help keep the promise of “Wonderful Hospitality. Always.” by delivering thoughtful, heartfelt, forward-thinking service that upholds and builds upon this living legacy. With the name that’s synonymous with hospitality the world over, we are proud to welcome you to explore a career with Marriott Hotels. In joining Marriott Hotels, you join a portfolio of brands with Marriott International. Be where you can do your best work, begin your purpose, belong to an amazing global team, and become the best version of you. 
 JW Marriott is part of Marriott International's luxury portfolio and consists of more than 100 beautiful properties in gateway cities and distinctive resort locations around the world. JW believes our associates come first. Because if you’re happy, our guests will be happy. JW Marriott associates are confident, innovative, genuine, intuitive, and carry on the legacy of the brand’s namesake and company founder, J.Willard Marriott. Our hotels offer a work experience unlike any other, where you’ll be part of a community and enjoy true camaraderie with a diverse group of co-workers. JW creates opportunities for training, development, recognition and most importantly, a place where you can pursue your passions in a luxury environment with a focus on holistic well-being. Treating guests exceptionally starts with the way we take care of our associates. That’s The JW Treatment™. In joining JW Marriott, you join a portfolio of brands with Marriott International. Be where you can do your best work,​ begin your purpose, belong to an amazing global​ team, and become the best version of you.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Mansioni - Eseguire i report sulle camere vendute, verificare lo stato delle camere, determinare le camere discordanti, dare priorità alla pulizia delle camere e aggiornare lo stato delle camere degli ospiti in partenza. - Assistere la gestione della Casa in attività quotidiane. - Agire da intermediario per coordinare gli sforzi tra Casa, Ingegneria, Ufficio Anteriore e Lavanderia. - Documentare e risolvere i problemi con le camere discordanti con la Reception. - Preparare e distribuire gli assegnamenti delle camere al personale di Casa. - Registrare, monitorare e aggiornare l'elenco delle camere "Non Disturbare". - Assicurarsi che le camere vuote sporche siano pulite entro il tempo necessario e assegnare le camere affrettate e le camere precedentemente sull'elenco "Non Disturbare". - Completare la documentazione obbligatoria per la Casa. - Seguire tutte le politiche e le procedure della società, di sicurezza e di sicurezza; segnalare eventuali problemi di manutenzione, pericoli per la sicurezza, incidenti o infortuni; completare la formazione e le certificazioni in materia di sicurezza. - Assicurarsi che l'uniforme e l'aspetto personale siano puliti e professionali; mantenere la riservatezza delle informazioni proprietarie; proteggere gli asset aziendali. - Accogliere e riconoscere tutti gli ospiti secondo gli standard aziendali; anticipare e soddisfare le esigenze di servizio degli ospiti; ringraziare gli ospiti con sincera gratitudine. - Garantire l'aderenza alle aspettative e agli standard di qualità. - Sviluppare e mantenere relazioni di lavoro positive con gli altri; supportare il team per raggiungere obiettivi comuni; ascoltare e rispondere in modo appropriato alle preoccupazioni degli altri dipendenti. - Parlare con gli altri utilizzando un linguaggio chiaro e professionale; preparare e rivedere documenti scritti in modo accurato e completo. - Inserire e localizzare informazioni relative al lavoro utilizzando i computer. - Stare in piedi, seduti o camminare per un periodo di tempo prolungato. - Muovere, sollevare, trasportare, spingere, tirare e posizionare oggetti del peso di meno o uguale a 10 libbre senza assistenza. - Eseguire altri ragionevoli compiti lavorativi richiesti dai supervisori. ##
• Requisiti - Essere uno studente universitario o universitario. ##
• Cosa offriamo - L'opportunità di costruire sulle tue conoscenze acquisite in classe attraverso il nostro programma di tirocinio alberghiero. - Imparerai di prima mano le operazioni di un hotel. - Il nostro programma di tirocinio alberghiero ti consente di vivere davvero l'industria dal basso verso l'alto, dove i nostri fondatori e molti dei nostri leader hanno iniziato. - Ti immergerai nella cultura e nel business di Marriott e troverai la tua vera vocazione nel settore dei viaggi. - I nostri tirocini sono generalmente disponibili in molte aree diverse dell'hotel. - Acquisendo esperienza pratica nel mondo entusiasmante della gestione alberghiera, sarai meglio preparato a cogliere le opportunità post-laurea. - Ecco a te esplorare, dare il via alla tua carriera dei sogni e unirti a noi nel tuo viaggio! ## Contatto Per essere presi in considerazione per un tirocinio, è necessario essere uno studente universitario o universitario. Vuoi unirti a noi?

Mansions - Berichte über die verkauften Zimmer durchführen, den Status der Zimmer überprüfen, die diskreten Zimmer bestimmen, die Reinigung der Zimmer priorisieren und den Status der Zimmer auf der Abreise aktualisieren. - Befolgen Sie die Verwaltung des Hauses in täglichen Aktivitäten. - Aktivieren Sie als Vermittler, um die Bemühungen zwischen Haus, Technik, Front Office und Wäscherei zu koordinieren. - Dokumentieren und lösen Sie die Probleme mit den Räumen diskret mit der Rezeption. - Bereiten und verteilen Sie Raumaufgaben an das Hauspersonal. - Aufzeichnen, überwachen und aktualisieren Sie die Liste der Zimmer "Nicht stören". - Stellen Sie sicher, dass die schmutzigen leeren Zimmer innerhalb der nötigen Zeit sauber sind und die Zimmer und Zimmer vorher auf der Liste "Nicht stören". - Vollständige Dokumentation für das Haus. - Folgen Sie allen Richtlinien und Verfahren des Unternehmens, Sicherheit und Sicherheit; melden Sie alle Wartungsprobleme, Sicherheitsrisiken, Unfälle oder Unfälle; vollständige Schulungs- und Sicherheitsbescheinigungen. - Stellen Sie sicher, dass ein einheitliches und persönliches Aussehen sauber und professionell ist; halten Sie die Vertraulichkeit der proprietären Informationen; schützen Sie Ihr Geschäftsvermögen. - Begrüßen und erkennen Sie alle Gäste nach Firmenstandards; erwarten und erfüllen die Bedürfnisse der Gäste Service; danken Sie den Gästen mit aufrichtiger Dankbarkeit. - Sicherstellung der Einhaltung der Erwartungen und Qualitätsstandards. - Entwicklung und Aufrechterhaltung positiver Arbeitsbeziehungen mit anderen; Unterstützung des Teams, um gemeinsame Ziele zu erreichen; hören und reagieren entsprechend auf die Bedenken anderer Mitarbeiter. - Sprechen Sie mit anderen über eine klare und professionelle Sprache; bereiten und überprüfen schriftliche Dokumente genau und vollständig. - Einfügen und lokalisieren Sie Informationen über die Arbeit mit Computern. - Stehen, sitzen oder lange laufen. - Bewegen, heben, tragen, drücken, ziehen und platzieren Gegenstände wiegen weniger oder gleich 10 Pfund ohne Hilfe. - Führen Sie andere angemessene Arbeitsaufgaben, die von Aufsichtspersonen benötigt werden. Voraussetzungen - Ein Universitäts- oder Universitätsstudent sein. oder
• Was wir bieten - die Möglichkeit, durch unser Hotelpraktikum auf Ihrem in der Klasse erworbenen Wissen aufzubauen. - Ja. Sie lernen die erste Hand über den Betrieb eines Hotels. - Ja. Unser Hotelpraktikum-Programm ermöglicht es Ihnen, die Branche von unten nach oben zu leben, wo unsere Gründer und viele unserer Führer begonnen haben. - Ja. Sie werden sich in Marriotts Kultur und Wirtschaft eintauchen und Ihre wahre Berufung in die Reisebranche finden. - Ja. Unsere Praktika sind in der Regel in vielen verschiedenen Bereichen des Hotels verfügbar. - Ja. Durch den Erwerb praktischer Erfahrung in der spannenden Welt des Hotelmanagements, werden Sie besser vorbereitet, postgraduale Möglichkeiten zu ergreifen. Kontakt Um für ein Praktikum zu berücksichtigen, müssen Sie eine Universität oder Universitätsstudent sein. Willst du mitkommen?
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Mansions - Effectuer des rapports sur les chambres vendues, vérifier l'état des chambres, déterminer les chambres discordantes, prioriser le nettoyage des chambres et mettre à jour l'état des chambres au départ. - Aider à la gestion de la Chambre dans les activités quotidiennes. - Agir en tant qu'intermédiaire pour coordonner les efforts entre la maison, l'ingénierie, la réception et la blanchisserie. - Documenter et résoudre les problèmes avec les chambres discordantes avec la réception. - Préparer et distribuer l'affectation des salles au personnel de la Chambre. - Enregistrez, surveillez et mettez à jour la liste des chambres "Ne dérangez pas". - Assurez-vous que les chambres vides sales sont propres dans le temps nécessaire et assignez les chambres et les chambres précédemment sur la liste "Ne pas déranger". - Remplir la documentation obligatoire pour la Chambre. - Suivre toutes les politiques et procédures de l'entreprise, la sûreté et la sécurité; signaler tout problème d'entretien, les risques de sécurité, les accidents ou les accidents; compléter la formation et les certifications de sécurité. - S'assurer que l'apparence uniforme et personnelle est propre et professionnelle; maintenir la confidentialité des renseignements exclusifs; protéger vos biens commerciaux. - Accueillir et reconnaître tous les invités selon les normes de l'entreprise; prévoir et répondre aux besoins du service des invités; remercier les invités avec une sincère gratitude. - Assurer le respect des attentes et des normes de qualité. - Établir et maintenir des relations de travail positives avec les autres; appuyer l'équipe pour atteindre des objectifs communs; écouter les préoccupations des autres employés et y répondre de façon appropriée. - Discutez avec d'autres en utilisant un langage clair et professionnel; préparez et examinez les documents écrits avec exactitude et avec précision. - Insérez et localisez des informations sur le travail à l'aide d'ordinateurs. - Debout, assis ou marchant longtemps. - Déplacer, soulever, transporter, pousser, tirer et placer des objets pesant moins ou égal à 10 livres sans assistance. - Effectuer d'autres tâches raisonnables exigées par les superviseurs.
• Exigences - Être étudiant à l'université ou à l'université. Oui. Ce que nous offrons - L'occasion de développer vos connaissances acquises en classe grâce à notre programme de stages hôteliers. - Oui. Vous apprendrez directement les opérations d'un hôtel. - Oui. Notre programme de stages hôteliers vous permet de vivre vraiment l'industrie d'en bas, où nos fondateurs et beaucoup de nos leaders ont commencé. - Oui. Vous vous plongerez dans la culture et les affaires de Marriott et trouverez votre véritable vocation dans l'industrie du voyage. - Oui. Nos stages sont généralement disponibles dans de nombreuses zones de l'hôtel. - Oui. En acquérant une expérience pratique dans le monde passionnant de la gestion hôtelière, vous serez mieux préparé à saisir les opportunités de troisième cycle. Contact Pour être pris en considération pour un stage, vous devez être un étudiant universitaire ou universitaire. Tu veux te joindre à nous ?

jobs.title: Storekeeper (Winter 26/27) - W VERBIER
jobs.description:
JOB DESCRIPTION 
 
 Visit in live here : W VERBIER Home 
 
 Become a W Talent and Embody the W Art of Living! 
 
 As a ‘Talent’, you are the essence of W for our guests. You bring a playful, warm and welcoming touch that makes all the difference in our W hotels. You are unique, passionate, and your personality shines through in every interaction. 
 
 
 
 AN EXCEPTIONAL OPPORTUNITY TO JOIN THE W VERBIER TEAM! 
 
 
 
 As a Storekeeper , you will assist the Purchasing Manager/Cost Controller in coordinating the purchasing requirements of the hotel. 
 
 You will be in charge of receiving and storing the items. 
 
 You will check the quality and state of items in the Food store rooms. 
 
 You have to carry out inventories. 
 
 
 
 PROFILE 
 
 Prior experience in the purchasing/cost control field 
 
 Ability to maintain the company’s strict finance standards at all times 
 
 HACCP knowledge 
 
 Fluency in French and English 
 
 Real interest in the worlds of taste, sound, body, scene and stance 
 
 
 Position to be filled for the Winter season : December 2026 to March 2027 
 
 Due to visa restrictions, only applications from Switzerland and the European Union will be considered 
 
 
 

 
 At Marriott International, we are dedicated to being an equal opportunity employer, welcoming all and providing access to opportunity. We actively foster an environment where the unique backgrounds of our associates are valued and celebrated. Our greatest strength lies in the rich blend of culture, talent, and experiences of our associates. We are committed to non-discrimination on any protected basis, including disability, veteran status, or other basis protected by applicable law. 

 
 W Hotels’ mission is to Ignite Curiosity, Expand Worlds. We are a place to experience life. We’re here to open doors and open minds. We are constantly inspired by new faces and new experiences. A tuned-in, up-for-anything spirit is at our core and has made us renowned for reinventing the norms of luxury around the globe. Whatever/Whenever is our culture and service philosophy that brings our guests’ passions to life. If you are original, innovative, and always looking towards the future of what’s possible, welcome to W Hotels. In joining W Hotels, you join a portfolio of brands with Marriott International. Be where you can do your best work,​ begin your purpose, belong to an amazing global​ team, and become the best version of you.

descriptionByLocale.it:
## Descrizione Visita in diretta qui: W VERBIER Home Diventa un W Talent e incarna l'arte di vivere di W! Come "Talent", sei l'essenza di W per i nostri ospiti. Porti un tocco giocoso, caldo e accogliente che fa la differenza nei nostri hotel W. Sei unico, appassionato e la tua personalità brilla in ogni interazione. UN'OPPORTUNITÀ ECCEZIONALE PER ENTRARE A FAR PARTE DEL TEAM W VERBIER! Come magazziniere, assisterai il Purchasing Manager/Cost Controller nel coordinare le esigenze di acquisto dell'hotel. - Sarai responsabile della ricezione e dello stoccaggio degli articoli. - Controllerai la qualità e lo stato degli articoli nei magazzini alimentari. - Dovrai effettuare gli inventari. ## Profilo - Esperienza precedente nel campo degli acquisti/controllo dei costi - Capacità di mantenere sempre gli elevati standard finanziari dell'azienda - Conoscenza HACCP - Fluente in francese e inglese - Vero interesse per i mondi del gusto, del suono, del corpo, della scena e della postura Posizione da ricoprire per la stagione invernale: dicembre 2026 - marzo 2027 A causa delle restrizioni sui visti, verranno prese in considerazione solo le candidature provenienti dalla Svizzera e dall'Unione Europea. ##
• Cosa offriamo Presso Marriott International, siamo impegnati a essere un datore di lavoro che offre pari opportunità, accogliendo tutti e fornendo accesso alle opportunità. Favoriamo attivamente un ambiente in cui i background unici dei nostri collaboratori sono valorizzati e celebrati. La nostra forza più grande risiede nella ricca combinazione di culture, talenti ed esperienze dei nostri collaboratori. Siamo impegnati a non discriminare su alcuna base protetta, inclusi disabilità, stato di veterano o altra base protetta dalla legge applicabile. La missione di W Hotels è accendere la curiosità, espandere i mondi. Siamo un luogo per vivere la vita. Siamo qui per aprire porte e menti. Siamo costantemente ispirati da nuovi volti e nuove esperienze. Uno spirito sintonizzato e pronto a tutto è alla base della nostra essenza e ci ha reso famosi per aver reinventato le norme del lusso in tutto il mondo. Whatever/Whenever è la nostra cultura e filosofia di servizio che porta alla vita le passioni dei nostri ospiti. Se sei originale, innovativo e sempre rivolto verso il futuro di ciò che è possibile, benvenuto a W Hotels. Unendoti a W Hotels, entri a far parte di un portfolio di brand con Marriott International. Sii dove puoi fare il tuo lavoro migliore, inizia il tuo scopo, appartieni a un'incredibile squadra globale e diventa la migliore versione di te stesso. ## Contatto (Nessuna informazione di contatto fornita nel testo originale)

descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Besuchen Sie hier: W VERBIER Home Werden Sie ein W Talent und verkörpern Sie die Kunst, W zu leben! Als "Talent" sind Sie die Essenz von W für unsere Gäste. Sie bringen einen lockeren, warmen und einladenden Touch, der in unseren W Hotels den Unterschied macht. Sie sind einzigartig, leidenschaftlich und Ihre Persönlichkeit strahlt in jeder Interaktion. EINE AUSSERGEWÖHNLICHE CHANCE, TEIL DES W VERBIER TEAMS ZU WERDEN! Als Lagerhalter unterstützen Sie den Purchasing Manager/Cost Controller bei der Koordination der Beschaffungsanforderungen des Hotels. - Sie sind verantwortlich für die Empfang und Lagerung der Artikel. - Sie kontrollieren die Qualität und den Zustand der Artikel in den Lebensmittel-Lagern. - Sie führen Inventuren durch. ## Profil - Vorherige Erfahrung im Bereich Beschaffung/Kostenkontrolle - Fähigkeit, die hohen finanziellen Standards des Unternehmens immer einzuhalten - Kenntnisse in HACCP - Fließend in Französisch und Englisch - Echter Interesse an den Welten des Geschmacks, des Klangs, des Körpers, der Szene und der Haltung Stellenausschreibung für die Wintersaison: Dezember 2026 - März 2027 Aufgrund von Visabeschränkungen werden nur Bewerbungen aus der Schweiz und der Europäischen Union berücksichtigt. ## Was bieten wir Bei Marriott International sind wir bestrebt, ein Arbeitgeber zu sein, der Chancengleichheit bietet, alle einlädt und Zugang zu Chancen gewährt. Wir fördern aktiv eine Umgebung, in der die einzigartigen Hintergründe unserer Mitarbeiter gewürdigt und gefeiert werden. Unsere größte Stärke liegt in der reichen Kombination von Kulturen, Talenten und Erfahrungen unserer Mitarbeiter. Wir sind bestrebt, auf keiner geschützten Grundlage zu diskriminieren, einschließlich Behinderung, Veteranenstatus oder einer anderen geschützten Grundlage nach dem jeweiligen geltenden Recht. Die Mission von W Hotels ist es, die Neugier zu entfachen und Welten zu erweitern. Wir sind ein Ort, um das Leben zu leben. Wir sind hier, um Türen und Gehirne zu öffnen. Wir werden ständig von neuen Gesichtern und neuen Erfahrungen inspiriert. Ein synchronisierter und bereitwilliger Geist ist die Grundlage unserer Essenz und hat uns berühmt gemacht, indem wir die Normen der Luxusbranche weltweit revolutioniert haben. Whatever/Whenever ist unsere Kultur und Servicephilosophie, die die Leidenschaften unserer Gäste zum Leben erweckt. Wenn Sie originell, innovativ und immer auf das Zukunftsbild dessen gerichtet sind, was möglich ist, sind Sie bei W Hotels willkommen. Wenn Sie sich W Hotels anschließen, werden Sie Teil eines Portfolios von Marken mit Marriott International. Seien Sie dort, wo Sie Ihre beste Arbeit leisten können, beginnen Sie Ihr Ziel, gehören Sie einem unglaublichen globalen Team an und werden Sie die beste Version von sich selbst.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Visitez ici: W VERBIER Home Devenez un Talent W et incarnez l'art de vivre W! En tant que "Talent", vous êtes l'essence de W pour nos invités. Vous apportez une touche joyeuse, chaleureuse et accueillante qui fait la différence dans nos hôtels W. Vous êtes unique, passionné et votre personnalité brille dans chaque interaction. UNE OPPORTUNITÉ EXCEPTIONNELLE DE REJOINDRE L'ÉQUIPE W VERBIER! En tant que responsable de stock, vous aiderez le Purchasing Manager/Cost Controller à coordonner les besoins d'achat de l'hôtel. - Vous serez responsable de la réception et du stockage des articles. - Vous contrôlerez la qualité et l'état des articles dans les magasins alimentaires. - Vous devrez effectuer les inventaires. ## Profil - Expérience précédente dans le domaine des achats/contrôle des coûts - Capacité à maintenir constamment les élevés standards financiers de l'entreprise - Connaissance HACCP - Courant en français et en anglais - Vrai intérêt pour les mondes du goût, du son, du corps, de la scène et de la posture Poste à pourvoir pour la saison hivernale: décembre 2026 - mars 2027 En raison des restrictions sur les visas, seules les candidatures provenant de la Suisse et de l'Union européenne seront prises en compte. ## Ce que nous offrons Chez Marriott International, nous nous efforçons d'être un employeur qui offre des opportunités égales, accueille tous et fournit un accès aux opportunités. Nous favorisons activement un environnement où les antécédents uniques de nos employés sont valorisés et célébrés. Notre plus grande force réside dans la riche combinaison de cultures, de talents et d'expériences de nos employés. Nous nous efforçons de ne pas discriminer sur aucune base protégée, y compris les handicaps, le statut de vétéran ou toute autre base protégée par la loi applicable. La mission de W Hotels est d'allumer la curiosité, d'élargir les mondes. Nous sommes un lieu pour vivre la vie. Nous sommes ici pour ouvrir les portes et les esprits. Nous sommes constamment inspirés par de nouveaux visages et de nouvelles expériences. Un esprit synchronisé et prêt à tout est à la base de notre essence et nous a rendus célèbres pour avoir réinventé les normes du luxe dans le monde entier. Whatever/Whenever est notre culture et philosophie de service qui donne vie aux passions de nos invités. Si vous êtes original, innovant et toujours tourné vers l'avenir de ce qui est possible, bienvenue chez W Hotels. En rejoignant W Hotels, vous faites partie d'un portefeuille de marques avec Marriott International. Soyez là où vous pouvez faire votre meilleur travail, commencez votre objectif, appartenez à une équipe globale incroyable et devenez la meilleure version de vous-même.

it: Esperienza precedente nel campo degli acquisti/controllo dei costi
Capacità di mantenere sempre gli elevati standard finanziari dell'azienda
Vero interesse per i mondi del gusto, del suono, del corpo, della scena e della postura
de: Fähigkeit, die hohen finanziellen Standards des Unternehmens immer einzuhalten
Echter Interesse an den Welten des Geschmacks, des Klangs, des Körpers, der Szene und der Haltung
fr: Expérience précédente dans le domaine des achats/contrôle des coûts
Capacité à maintenir constamment les élevés standards financiers de l'entreprise
Connaissance HACCP
Courant en français et en anglais
Vrai intérêt pour les mondes du goût, du son, du corps, de la scène et de la posture

jobs.title: Stagiaire Sales Events
jobs.description:
Build upon your classroom studies through our Hotel Internship Program opportunities. You will learn first-hand about a hotel's operations. Our Hotel Internship Program allows you to truly experience the industry from the ground up, where our founders and many of our leaders began. You will get immersed in Marriott's culture and business and find your true calling in the travel industry. Our internships are typically available in many different areas of the hotel. By gaining hands-on experience in the exciting world of hotel management, you�ll be better prepared to pursue opportunities post graduation. Here�s to exploring, kickstarting your dream career, and joining us on your journey!
 
 To be considered for an internship, you must be a current college or university student. Want to join us? Apply now!
 
 Marriott International is the world�s largest hotel company, with more brands, more hotels and more opportunities for associates to grow and succeed. We believe a great career is a journey of discovery and exploration. So, we ask, where will your journey take you?
 
 marriotthotelinternship

 
 At Marriott International, we are dedicated to being an equal opportunity employer, welcoming all and providing access to opportunity. We actively foster an environment where the unique backgrounds of our associates are valued and celebrated. Our greatest strength lies in the rich blend of culture, talent, and experiences of our associates. We are committed to non-discrimination on any protected basis, including disability, veteran status, or other basis protected by applicable law. 

 
 At more than 100 award-winning properties worldwide, The Ritz-Carlton Ladies and Gentlemen create experiences so exceptional that long after a guest stays with us, the experience stays with them. Attracting the world’s top hospitality professionals who curate lifelong memories, we believe that everyone succeeds when they are empowered to be creative, thoughtful and compassionate. 
Every day, we set the standard for rare and special luxury service the world over and pride ourselves on delivering excellence in the care and comfort of our guests.
 
Your role will be to ensure that the “Gold Standards” of The Ritz-Carlton are delivered graciously and thoughtfully every day. The Gold Standards are the foundation of The Ritz-Carlton and are what guides us each day to be better than the next. It is this foundation and our belief that our culture drives success by which The Ritz Carlton has earned the reputation as a global brand leader in luxury hospitality. As part of our team, you will learn and exemplify the Gold Standards, such as our Employee Promise, Credo and our Service Values. And our promise to you is that we offer the chance to be proud of the work you do and who you work with.
 
In joining The Ritz-Carlton, you join a portfolio of brands with Marriott International. Be where you can do your best work, begin your purpose, belong to an amazing global team, and become the best version of you.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Costruire sui vostri studi di classe attraverso le nostre opportunità di Hotel Internship Program. Imparerete di prima mano sulle operazioni di un hotel. Il nostro Hotel Internship Program ti permette di sperimentare veramente l'industria da zero, dove i nostri fondatori e molti dei nostri leader hanno cominciato. Ti immergerai nella cultura e nel business di Marriott e troverai la tua vera vocazione nel settore dei viaggi. I nostri stage sono tipicamente disponibili in molte diverse aree dell'hotel. Guadagnando esperienza pratica nel mondo emozionante della gestione alberghiera, sarete meglio preparati a perseguire opportunità post laurea. Ecco per esplorare, iniziare la tua carriera da sogno, e unirsi a noi nel tuo viaggio! Per essere considerato per uno stage, si deve essere un attuale college o studente universitario. Vuoi unirti a noi? Applicare subito! Marriott International è la più grande società alberghiera del mondo, con più marchi, più hotel e più opportunità per i soci di crescere e avere successo. Crediamo che una grande carriera sia un viaggio di scoperta ed esplorazione. Allora, chiediamo, dove vi portera' il vostro viaggio? marriotthotelinternship A Marriott International, siamo dedicati ad essere un datore di lavoro pari opportunità, accogliendo tutti e fornendo l'accesso alle opportunità. Promuoviamo attivamente un ambiente in cui gli sfondi unici dei nostri associati sono apprezzati e celebrati. La nostra più grande forza risiede nella ricca miscela di cultura, talento ed esperienze dei nostri associati. Ci impegniamo a non discriminazione su base protetta, tra cui disabilità, status di veterano, o altre basi protette dalla legge applicabile. In oltre 100 strutture premiate in tutto il mondo, The Ritz-Carlton Signore e Signori creano esperienze così eccezionali che a lungo dopo un ospite soggiorna con noi, l'esperienza rimane con loro. Attrarre i migliori professionisti dell’ospitalità del mondo che curano i ricordi per tutta la vita, crediamo che tutti ci riescano quando hanno il potere di essere creativi, riflessivi e compassionevoli. Ogni giorno, abbiamo stabilito lo standard per il servizio di lusso raro e speciale in tutto il mondo e ci orgogliosi di fornire l'eccellenza nella cura e nel comfort dei nostri ospiti. Il vostro ruolo sarà quello di garantire che i “Gold Standards” di The Ritz-Carlton vengano consegnati con gentilezza e con pensiero ogni giorno. Gli Gold Standards sono la base di The Ritz-Carlton e sono ciò che ci guida ogni giorno per essere meglio del prossimo. E 'questa fondazione e la nostra convinzione che la nostra cultura spinge il successo con cui The Ritz-Carlton ha guadagnato la reputazione di leader di marca globale nell'ospitalità di lusso. Nell'ambito del nostro team, imparerai ed esemplificherai gli standard dell'oro, come la nostra promessa dei dipendenti, il credo e i nostri valori di servizio. E la nostra promessa è che offriamo la possibilità di essere orgogliosi del lavoro che fate e con cui lavorate. Nell'unione con The Ritz-Carlton, ti unisci a un portafoglio di marchi con Marriott International. Essere dove si può fare il vostro lavoro migliore, iniziare il vostro scopo, appartengono a un team globale incredibile, e diventare la migliore versione di voi.

descriptionByLocale.de: Bewerben Sie sich auf Ihre Klassenzimmer-Studien durch unsere Hotel Praktikumsprogramm Möglichkeiten. Sie werden zuerst über den Betrieb eines Hotels erfahren. Unser Hotel Internship Program ermöglicht es Ihnen, die Branche von Grund auf zu erleben, wo unsere Gründer und viele unserer Führer begannen. Sie werden in Marriotts Kultur und Geschäft eingetaucht und finden Ihren richtigen Ruf in der Reisebranche. Unsere Praktika sind in der Regel in vielen verschiedenen Bereichen des Hotels verfügbar. Durch die praktische Erfahrung in der spannenden Welt des Hotelmanagements werden Sie besser vorbereitet, um Chancen nach Abschluss zu verfolgen. Hier ist zu erkunden, Ihre Traumkarriere zu starten und uns auf Ihrer Reise zu begleiten! Um für ein Praktikum zu gelten, müssen Sie ein aktuelles College oder Universitätsstudent sein. Willst du mitkommen? Jetzt bewerben! Marriott International ist das weltweit größte Hotelunternehmen, mit mehr Marken, mehr Hotels und mehr Möglichkeiten für Mitarbeiter wachsen und erfolgreich. Wir glauben, dass eine große Karriere eine Reise von Entdeckung und Exploration ist. Also fragen wir, wo wird Ihre Reise Sie mitnehmen? marriotthotelintern Bei Marriott International widmen wir uns als Arbeitgeber der Chancengleichheit, begrüßen alle und bieten Zugang zur Gelegenheit. Wir fördern aktiv eine Umgebung, in der die einzigartigen Hintergründe unserer Mitarbeiter geschätzt und gefeiert werden. Unsere größte Stärke liegt in der reichen Mischung aus Kultur, Talent und Erfahrungen unserer Mitarbeiter. Wir verpflichten uns zur Nichtdiskriminierung auf jeder geschützten Grundlage, einschließlich Behinderung, veteranischer Status oder anderer durch geltendes Recht geschützter Grundlage. Bei mehr als 100 preisgekrönten Unterkünften weltweit schaffen die Ritz-Carlton Damen und Herren so außergewöhnliche Erlebnisse, dass die Erfahrung nach einem Gast bei uns bleibt. Anziehen der weltweit besten Gastfreundschaft Profis, die lebenslange Erinnerungen heilen, glauben wir, dass jeder Erfolg hat, wenn sie befähigt sind, kreativ, nachdenklich und mitfühlend zu sein. Jeden Tag setzen wir den Standard für den seltenen und besonderen Luxus-Service der Welt und stolz uns auf die Bereitstellung von Exzellenz in der Pflege und dem Komfort unserer Gäste. Ihre Aufgabe wird es sein, sicherzustellen, dass die „Goldstandards“ von The Ritz-Carlton jeden Tag gnädig und nachdenklich geliefert werden. Die Goldstandards sind die Grundlage von The Ritz-Carlton und sind das, was uns jeden Tag besser als der nächste führt. Es ist diese Grundlage und unser Glaube, dass unsere Kultur Erfolg treibt, durch die The Ritz-Carlton den Ruf als globaler Markenführer in der Luxus-Hospitalität verdient hat. Im Rahmen unseres Teams lernen und exemplifizieren Sie die Gold-Standards, wie unsere Employee Promise, Credo und unsere Service-Werte. Und unser Versprechen an Sie ist, dass wir die Chance bieten, stolz auf die Arbeit zu sein, mit der Sie arbeiten. Bei der Teilnahme an The Ritz-Carlton nehmen Sie mit Marriott International ein Portfolio an Marken bei. Seien Sie, wo Sie Ihre beste Arbeit tun können, beginnen Sie Ihren Zweck, gehören zu einem erstaunlichen globalen Team und werden die beste Version von Ihnen.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Profitez de vos études en classe grâce à notre programme de stages dans l'hôtel. Vous apprendrez directement les opérations d'un hôtel. Notre programme de stages hôteliers vous permet d'expérimenter l'industrie depuis le début, où nos fondateurs et beaucoup de nos leaders ont commencé. Vous vous plongerez dans la culture et les affaires de Marriott et trouverez votre véritable vocation dans l'industrie du voyage. Nos stages sont généralement disponibles dans de nombreuses zones de l'hôtel. En acquérant une expérience pratique dans le monde passionnant de la gestion hôtelière, vous serez mieux préparé à poursuivre des opportunités après l'obtention du diplôme. Ici à explorer, démarrer votre carrière de rêve, et nous rejoindre dans votre voyage! Pour être considéré pour un stage, vous devez être un étudiant collégial ou universitaire actuel. Tu veux te joindre à nous ? Présentez-vous ! Marriott International est la plus grande entreprise hôtelière du monde, avec plus de marques, plus d'hôtels et plus de possibilités pour les associés de croître et de réussir. Nous croyons qu'une grande carrière est un voyage de découverte et d'exploration. Alors, nous demandons, où va vous mener votre voyage ? marriotthotelinternat Chez Marriott International, nous nous engageons à être un employeur à égalité des chances, accueillant tous et offrant l'accès aux possibilités. Nous favorisons activement un environnement où les origines uniques de nos associés sont appréciées et célébrées. Notre plus grande force réside dans le riche mélange de culture, de talent et d'expériences de nos associés. Nous sommes attachés à la non-discrimination sur toute base protégée, y compris le handicap, le statut d'ancien combattant ou toute autre base protégée par la loi applicable. Dans plus de 100 établissements primés dans le monde entier, les Dames et Messieurs Ritz-Carlton créent des expériences si exceptionnelles qu'après qu'un invité reste avec nous, l'expérience reste avec eux. Attirer le monde des meilleurs professionnels de l'hôtellerie qui s'occupent des souvenirs de toute une vie, nous croyons que tout le monde réussit quand il est habilité à être créatif, réfléchi et compatissant. Chaque jour, nous établissons la norme pour un service de luxe rare et spécial dans le monde entier et nous sommes fiers d'offrir l'excellence dans le soin et le confort de nos clients. Votre rôle sera de veiller à ce que les normes d'or du Ritz-Carlton soient délivrées gracieusement et avec soin chaque jour. Les Standards d'or sont la fondation du Ritz-Carlton et sont ce qui nous guide chaque jour à être meilleurs que le suivant. C'est cette fondation et notre conviction que notre culture est à l'origine du succès grâce auquel The Ritz-Carlton a acquis la réputation de leader mondial de l'hospitalité de luxe. Dans le cadre de notre équipe, vous apprendrez et illustrerez les normes d'or, comme notre promesse d'employé, Credo et nos valeurs de service. Et notre promesse est que nous offrons la chance d'être fiers du travail que vous faites et avec qui vous travaillez. En rejoignant The Ritz-Carlton, vous rejoignez un portefeuille de marques avec Marriott International. Soyez là où vous pouvez faire votre meilleur travail, commencer votre objectif, appartenir à une équipe mondiale incroyable, et devenir la meilleure version de vous.
